title: Example Product | WebApp | 2026-04-15
content: Example Product added routing rule previews. Admins can now see which team would receive a sample conversation before saving a routing change. This release also improves export status messages in Reports > Exports.

title: Example Product | Mobile | 2026-04-08
content: The mobile app now refreshes assignment badges more quickly after an agent changes availability. This release also fixes a notification badge count issue after conversations are reassigned from a team inbox.

title: Example Product | WebApp | 2026-03-28
content: Conversation exports now include a status timeline by default. Account owners can disable private-note inclusion for compliance exports from Settings > Compliance.

title: Example Product | Mobile | 2026-04-22
content: The mobile app now shows a clearer pending badge for replies queued during unstable connectivity. This release also improves reconnect handling after an agent switches networks.
